name: UK AI Regulation Compliance
description: By MEOK AI Labs -- First-mover compliance tool for the UK's upcoming AI regulatory framework (expected mid-2026). Classify risk, check AISI alignment, compare EU vs UK approaches, and generate UK-specific impact assessments.

tools.name: classify_uk_risk
tools.description: Classify AI system risk under UK regulatory framework

tools.name: check_aisi_alignment
tools.description: Check alignment with UK AI Safety Institute standards

tools.name: compare_eu_uk
tools.description: Compare EU AI Act vs UK regulatory approach

tools.name: assess_readiness
tools.description: Assess organizational readiness for UK AI regulation

tools.name: generate_impact_assessment
tools.description: Generate a UK-specific AI Impact Assessment
